---

# Prototype Request

## Problem Statement

Describe the workflow, control, deployment, or engineering problem.

## Desired Outcome

What should the prototype demonstrate?

## Constraints

List tooling, platform, language, security, or compliance constraints.

## Non-Goals

What should the prototype not attempt to do?

## Acceptance Criteria

What would make this prototype successful?

## Evidence Required

What logs, reports, screenshots, workflow artifacts, or documents should be produced?

## Reuse Model

How should this prototype be packaged if successful?
